title: Shouldnt there be a new section for discussing the upsoming series
display_title: Shouldnt there be a new section for discussing the upsoming series
wikitext:
[]: Shouldn't there be a new section for discussing the upsoming series?             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Tue Mar 10, 2026 9:53 pm I keep going to the sections for the original show or the rebuilds and seeing threads about the new upcoming series. Isn't it about time to create a new section just for that?

[]: Re: Shouldn't there be a new section for discussing the upsoming series?             Quote Post by Diego the Lego » Tue Mar 10, 2026 11:45 pm There will be one in due time. Not enough info to justify it at the moment I think.

[]: Re: Shouldn't there be a new section for discussing the upsoming series?             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Fri Mar 13, 2026 8:25 pm What's annoying is that every existing topic now seems to have its own thread about the new show, but they are all the same.

[]: Re: Shouldn't there be a new section for discussing the upsoming series?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Fri Mar 13, 2026 10:43 pm Diego the Lego wrote: There will be one in due time. Not enough info to justify it at the moment I think.
